title: IVR - Hololive Train Pack
description: IVR - Hololive Train Pack, contains KCRC Trains HD Model with Hololive Outfits for Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) Mod
body:
![IVR - Integrated Train Pack Subpack Contents](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3ab98e9489ae6663bc48a8361b936fba2efe8a9.png) ![Aqua Train](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4496095121d71672fc907959c90e66f1d7d45215.jpeg)

**Overview**
--- This pack main features Hololive Outfit KCR Trains.
此高清材質包內含有：九廣鐵路-第三代電氣化列車 (Hololive塗裝)
All trains contain textures in 3 levels of resolution.
所有列車皆包括1x,3x,5x材質解像度
**Before Download 下載須知** --- No modification and republish is allowed without the author's consent.
未經作者許可，禁止編輯及再發佈作品
**NTE Preload Optimisation** --- This resourcepack support NTE preload function, enable **NTE Preload** function to get smoother gameplay experience.
Please make sure NTE version is v.0.5.1 or above.
這材質包支持NTE預加載功能，可有效降低電腦效能負荷，NTE版本需要v.0.5.1或以上。
**IVR Packs** --- ![IVR PACK v8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4027e20f1283595bb8707fdc5de0867e234b477b_0.webp) **Train List 列車列表**： --- ![Hololive Train List](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6d911b9a39b766c0de641ffbadba8898c34ca26.jpeg) 1. [Hololive] KCR Millennium Train (Shirakami Fubuki/白上吹雪) 2023 Birthday Anniversary East Rail
2. [Hololive] KCR Millennium Train (Shirakami Fubuki/白上吹雪) 2023 Birthday Anniversary West Rail
3. [Hololive] KCR Millennium Train (Shirakami Fubuki/白上吹雪) 2023 Birthday Anniversary Ma On Shan Rail
4. [Hololive] KCR Millennium Train (Minato Aqua/湊阿庫婭)
5. [Hololive] KCR Millennium Train (Minato Aqua/湊阿庫婭) v2
6. [Hololive] KCR Millennium Train (Houshou Marine/寶鐘瑪琳)
